flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Oakwood University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Oakwood University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.0k → $22.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Oakwood University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.0k → $22.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oakwood University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).
